history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image shows a classroom scene. There are students sitting at desks, facing a large screen. A teacher, wearing a hijab, is seated at a desk in front of the screen, working on a laptop. Behind the teacher is a banner with text that appears to be for an event or school activity, possibly related to "FORTASHINE" and "SMA". There is also a cartoonish frog character on the banner. The overall atmosphere appears to be that of a typical educational setting. There is no nudity or NSFW content present in the image.
